Core_Phenotypic_Effect.reason: For Bnatt12, the paper reports little visible seed coat color change, drastic reduction of PA accumulation, the highest oil increase (8.25% above WT), and decreased C18:1 with increased C18:2/C18:3.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: Each listed point is supported in Results/Discussion: reduced PA accumulation with near-WT seed color, largest oil increase, altered FA composition, and up-regulation of oil body/lipid genes in Bnatt12.
